item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p06","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response immediately refuses the requested refrigerator-side confirmer, explicitly names the three prior manual gates, identifies the repeating downstream-manual-verification pattern, and moves the action upstream toward process/system state recording, conflict blocking, and handoff closure instead of adding another local check."}
